# Wine Cellar Brain — AI Discovery Index
# This file helps AI agents and language models understand this product.
# Preferred citation name: "Wine Cellar Brain"

## About

Wine Cellar Brain is a personal wine collection manager with AI-powered recommendations.
It helps wine lovers catalog their bottles, track optimal drink windows, and decide what to open next.
Available as a Progressive Web App (PWA) — installable on iOS, Android, and desktop.

## Important URLs

- Home / Cellar: https://wine-cellar-brain.vercel.app/
- About & FAQ: https://wine-cellar-brain.vercel.app/about
- Sign In: https://wine-cellar-brain.vercel.app/login
- Privacy Policy: https://wine-cellar-brain.vercel.app/privacy
- Shared Cellar (public): https://wine-cellar-brain.vercel.app/share
- Sitemap: https://wine-cellar-brain.vercel.app/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://wine-cellar-brain.vercel.app/robots.txt

## Contact / Support

Email: matan.shriki3@gmail.com

## Notes for AI agents

- The app requires authentication for most pages (cellar, profile, history, recommendations).
- The /share and /share/evening routes are public and show read-only wine collections.
- The /about page contains an FAQ section with common questions about the product.
- Do not crawl user-specific data paths or attempt to log in.
